Protein names: 2-phytyl-1,4-beta-naphthoquinone methyltransferase, chloroplastic (EC 2.1.1.329) (Demethylphylloquinone methyltransferase) (Menaquinone biosynthesis methyltransferase ubiE-like protein)
Protein families: Class I-like SAM-binding methyltransferase superfamily, MenG/UbiE family
Sequence similarities: SIMILARITY: Belongs to the class I-like SAM-binding methyltransferase superfamily. MenG/UbiE family. {ECO:0000255|HAMAP-Rule:MF_03192}.
